steps.title: Identify the sides relative to angle B
steps.content: The right angle is at C (marked with a square). Angle B is at the bottom right vertex. The side opposite angle B is AC = 24, and the hypotenuse (opposite the right angle) is AB = 40.

steps.title: Apply the sine ratio
steps.content: The sine of angle B equals the opposite side divided by the hypotenuse: $\sin B = \frac{24}{40}$. To simplify, divide both numerator and denominator by their greatest common divisor, 8: $$\sin B = \frac{3}{5}$$A is correct.
